groups.name: python-local-web-and-validation
groups.replaces_responsibility: Local typed HTTP/API, session, CSRF, host boundary, TOML validation and bounded login throttling.
groups.upgrade_rule: Regenerate hashed locks, rerun web security and browser acceptance, and review upstream security notes.
groups.exit_rule: Replace the single local App composition root and generated OpenAPI contract; no product facts live in these libraries.
groups.persistent_runtime_impact: No additional process, worker, database or durable lifecycle.

groups.name: python-postgresql
groups.replaces_responsibility: PostgreSQL driver, transactions, schema migration and thin query composition.
groups.upgrade_rule: Upgrade as one tested database slice with upgrade/downgrade and role-boundary evidence.
groups.exit_rule: SQL schema and PostgreSQL archives remain standard; replace adapters without a second database model.
groups.persistent_runtime_impact: Uses the one selected PostgreSQL service; adds no service.

groups.name: python-windows-and-local-secrets
groups.replaces_responsibility: WinVault, exact Windows SID/DACL/task primitives and maintained password hashing.
groups.upgrade_rule: Requalify the exact WinVault backend, cross-SID access, task start/stop and password verification.
groups.exit_rule: Credentials stay in Windows Credential Manager and hashes use standard Argon2 encoding; rotate references when replacing a component.
groups.persistent_runtime_impact: No daemon; uses Windows facilities already selected by the runtime design.

groups.name: python-observability
groups.replaces_responsibility: Structured Halpha JSON event rendering while stdlib owns file rotation.
groups.upgrade_rule: Rerun redaction and JSONL rotation tests.
groups.exit_rule: JSON Lines remain readable without structlog; replace the renderer only.

groups.name: python-quant-stack
groups.replaces_responsibility: Single live/backtest engine, Binance adapters, indicators, reports, Parquet catalog and supported tabular wrangling boundary.
groups.upgrade_rule: New fixed version requires artifact, adapter, lifecycle, strategy parity, Demo and historical-evidence requalification.
groups.exit_rule: Raw/checksummed market inputs and Halpha product records remain authoritative; replace as one stack without a parallel adapter or engine.
groups.persistent_runtime_impact: Runs inside the one Executor and one-shot evidence tools; no added service.

groups.name: python-build-and-test
groups.replaces_responsibility: Deterministic packaging, hash locking, tests, generated fixtures and governance validation.
groups.upgrade_rule: Regenerate locks in the repository venv and rerun the complete qualification suite.
groups.exit_rule: Source, lock files and standard wheels remain usable by replacement build/test tooling.

groups.name: frontend-runtime
groups.replaces_responsibility: Single workbench UI, schema forms, in-memory queries, routing and generated OpenAPI client.
groups.upgrade_rule: Use npm ci from the lock, rebuild static dist, and rerun visual, interaction and axe acceptance.
groups.exit_rule: The server API and /operations fallback remain authoritative; replace the static frontend without a second product backend.
groups.persistent_runtime_impact: Static files only in production; no Node process.

groups.name: frontend-build-and-test
groups.replaces_responsibility: Type generation, CSP-safe build-time JSON Schema validator compilation, static bundling, unit tests, browser automation and accessibility evidence.
groups.upgrade_rule: Use the exact npm lock and rerun typecheck, build, unit, Playwright and axe gates.
groups.exit_rule: Generated static dist and source remain standard artifacts; tools never own product state.
